message.content: The screen shows Sana AI’s interface with a left sidebar (Chat, Workflows, Search, Meetings, More; Folders section with Demo folder) and a main content area. A modal dialog (“Help us improve”) overlays the center, offering “Don’t share” (white) and “Share analytics” (dark) buttons, with a close (×) icon. The top bar has “All” dropdown, “Invite,” and “Help” buttons. The bottom left shows usage stats (“10 meetings and 20 messages left”) and an “Upgrade” button. Colors: light gray background, white modal, dark text, black/white buttons.
